aliases.note: AUX/IAA is a gene family; IAA3 is a well-characterized Aux/IAA repressor present in KB (alongside IAA1, IAA6, IAA14). Used as representative family member.
BAK1 is SERK3, part of the SERK co-receptor family. KB has ATSERK4 and ATSERK5. ATSERK4 used as closest SERK-family representative for BRI1 co-receptor function.
BR treatment maps directly to the Brassinosteroid hormone node in KB.
CRY2 not present verbatim. KB has CRY1 and the family node Cryptochromes. Cryptochromes chosen as family-level node covering CRY2 function in blue-light perception.
CTR1 is a Raf-like kinase negative regulator of ethylene signaling. Not present in KB. Mapped to Ethylene pathway node; CTR1 KO constitutively activates ethylene response.

DWF4 (CYP90B1) is a BR biosynthesis C-22 hydroxylase. Not present in KB. DET2 is present and is another BR biosynthesis enzyme (steroid 5-alpha-reductase) in the same pathway. Mapped as BR-biosynthesis mechanism analog.
EIN2 not in KB. EIN3 is the immediately downstream transcription factor in the ethylene signaling pathway and present in KB. Used as pathway-adjacent proxy for ethylene signaling output.
ELF3_EC composite (ELF3-ELF4-LUX Evening Complex) maps directly to the Evening_Complex node in KB.
FHY1 not in KB. FHY1 is required for PHYA nuclear import; no direct family node available. Mapped to PHYA as pathway-required partner; FHY1 loss phenocopies PHYA loss for nuclear PHYA responses.
GA20OX1 not present verbatim. KB has ATGA20OX4 and ATGA20OX5 (same GA20-oxidase family). ATGA20OX4 used as closest family representative for GA biosynthesis.
Exact match with AT-prefix standardization (ATGA3OX1 = Arabidopsis GA3OX1).
GA4 is a bioactive gibberellin species. KB has the general Gibberellin hormone node. Mapped as treatment analog.

GID1 (GA receptor) not in KB. GID1 binds GA and targets DELLA for degradation; mapped to DELLA as the immediate downstream node so GID1 perturbations propagate through the GA-DELLA axis present in KB.
Exact match with AT-prefix standardization (ATHSFA1D = Arabidopsis HSFA1D).
SOB7 not in KB. SOB3 (AHL29) is a related AHL-family suppressor-of-phyB gene present in KB. Used as closest family representative.
TOC1 is the same gene as PRR1/APRR1 (exact synonym). KB uses the APRR1 identifier.
Exact match with AT-prefix standardization (ATUVR8 = Arabidopsis UVR8).
YUC8 not present verbatim. KB has the family node YUC (plus ATYUC4, ATYUC6, YUC3). YUC chosen as family-level node covering YUC8 auxin-biosynthesis function.
